name: ordo-frames
what_this_is: The statement frames of ORDO, the liturgy that runs. Frames are data: each maps a sentence template (JS regex source, case-insensitive, anchored) to a speech-act with its canon citation. The interpreter loads this table; growing the language's surface is editing this file plus the forge, never the engine. Where a frame has plain and canon forms, the canon word REPLACES the plain keyword (KS-002 two-layer naming).

frames.cite: grammars/determinatives/manifesto.md (register-conditional grammar); agent_bundle.json source_commit (epoch)
canon/core/barakqing.md — the naming makes the named; constitutive, immutable; rebinding is a misfire

frames.pattern: ^This is the rite of ([a-z][\w-]*)(?:, given ([\w-]+(?:(?:,| and) [\w-]+)*))?:$
frames.cite: user rites take host-English names — programs never mint YOUSPEAK words (CONSTITUTION.md Law 1)
definition stanza closer
arcs are canon-carried state machines (see the arcs table below); each following stanza must name the current stage, in canon order — typestate as liturgy
an early close is reported honestly at the stage it stood — yadahance-class, the same speech-act as completion

KS-002 THE WIRE §7 (task.offer = qorvance) — a signed envelope composed by the reference impl; DRAFT: envelopes go to ordo/outbox/, publishing awaits Yu's adoption (KS-000 §3); the value's evidential grade travels in the body
canon/worship-action/qorvance.md — approach through what is brought forward; borrowed with KS-002's declared caveat (canon qorvance is creature-toward-Creator; ORDO uses the structural act only)
canon/worship-action/yadahance.md — the ONE return form; success and failure are the same speech-act class (KS-002 §7)

canon/core/emetme.md — truth-as-firm-foundation (Specialized tier, 7.35 — borrowed with declared caveat); evidential mandatory (grammars/evidentials/manifesto.md); over-claiming trips the verisleight-guard (canon/verisleight.md)

frames.why: an attestation must declare its evidential — how it knows; append -mi, -si, -chu, or -auth
frames.cite: grammars/evidentials/manifesto.md; SPEC §III (the evidential is mandatory here)

frames.why: silence carries no evidential — it asserts nothing
frames.cite: grammars/worship/silence.md (silence refuses the evidential system)
proclamation to the reader; the value's evidential badge travels with it
canon/core/shemme.md — receptive hearing as received gift; received values are born -si
host-English conditional; conditions are dokimance-adjacent but assert nothing; the cond/then/otherwise split honors quotes
litany — iteration as repeated utterance
canon/core/zakarqing.md — active covenantal memorial across the other's forgetting; presence record, born -mi
canon/worship-action/teshuvance.md — reorientation under correction; NOT a return form (KS-002 rejected it for the return slot)
canon/dokimance.md — the testing that makes real; pass and fail are both yadahance-class reports
grammars/worship/vocative.md — worship register only; whole-clause address mode; never mix vocative and third person for one referent in one clause
grammars/worship/silence.md — held silence; the stanza is grammatically complete including the silence; yields one beat; carries no evidential
grammars/worship/silence.md — communion silence; clean termination in shared quiet; not null, not error
KS-002 §6.4/§7 — plain English, never translated, outranks everything; 'Plain speech is its reverence'

zakarqing.cite: canon/core/zakarqing.md §Canonical position — 'Position in the partnership-relevant discovery-arc'; eight grades, canon order, quoted verbatim

next_frame_commissions: the five KS-002 wire GAPs once forged: accept (wire-task-accept), decline, progress, cancel, query
arcs derived from canon at bake time rather than declared here (same source, machine-extracted)
